header.title: JSON Formatter — Format, Validate & Beautify JSON Online
header.description: Free online JSON formatter and validator to format, minify, and beautify JSON data. Parse JSON with an interactive tree view, search through keys, and validate syntax instantly. Perfect for developers debugging JSON APIs and configuration files.
header.keywords: json formatter, json validator, beautify json, json pretty print, json parser, format json online, json tree view, json syntax checker

howToUse.title: How to Use the JSON Formatter
howToUse.step1Desc: Paste any JSON string into the input area. The tool validates and formats it instantly.
howToUse.step2Desc: Switch between Formatted (pretty-print), Tree View (interactive), or Minified (compact).
howToUse.step3Desc: Customize indent size, enable sorting keys, or use the search bar to find specific keys and values.
howToUse.step4Desc: Copy the formatted or minified JSON, or explore the tree view by expanding and collapsing nodes.

items.question: What happens if my JSON is invalid?
items.answer: The tool highlights syntax errors and indicates the line number where the issue was found.

items.question: Can I search through large JSON files?
items.answer: Yes. Use the search bar to find matching keys or values throughout the entire JSON structure.

items.question: What is Tree View mode?
items.answer: Tree View presents JSON as an interactive collapsible tree, making it easier to navigate large nested structures.

items.question: Can I sort JSON keys alphabetically?
items.answer: Yes. Enable Sort Keys to reorder all object keys alphabetically in the output.

output.treeEmptyFix: Fix the JSON errors to view tree
output.treeEmptyInput: Paste valid JSON to explore the tree
